title: Bridge Optimism - Open App
meta_description: bridge optimism through the official OP Mainnet Gateway to move ETH or supported ERC-20 tokens between Ethereum and OP Mainnet.
hero_h2: Move assets between Ethereum and OP Mainnet
hero_lead: bridge optimism starts at the official OP Mainnet Gateway for moving ETH and supported ERC-20 tokens between Ethereum and OP Mainnet with wallet-controlled transactions.
what_is: OP Mainnet Gateway is the Optimism Foundation-linked bridge interface for moving assets between Ethereum and OP Mainnet. The underlying Standard Bridge supports ETH and most standard ERC-20 tokens.

how.d: Use the official app URL and connect a wallet you control.
Select Ethereum to OP Mainnet for deposits, or OP Mainnet to Ethereum for withdrawals.
Review token, network, recipient, and wallet approval details before signing.
Deposits are typically faster; withdrawals to Ethereum include the protocol challenge period.

points.p: The app routes users to Optimism's official bridge surface rather than a third-party landing flow.
OP Mainnet is an Ethereum Layer 2; official docs describe bridging as moving data and tokens between the two networks.
Confirm token addresses, chain IDs, and the app domain; OP Mainnet details are listed in Optimism network information.

faq.q: What is bridge optimism used for?
faq.a: It is used to route users to the official Optimism bridge app for moving ETH or supported ERC-20 tokens between Ethereum and OP Mainnet.

faq.q: Is bridge optimism the official Optimism app?
faq.a: This page is not the app; the official action happens at app.optimism.io/bridge. Always verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: How long does bridge optimism take?
faq.a: Optimism docs state Ethereum to OP Mainnet transfers through the Standard Bridge are usually completed within 1-3 minutes, while OP Mainnet to Ethereum withdrawals complete in 7 days because of the challenge period.

faq.q: Which tokens can I bridge optimism with?
faq.a: The Standard Bridge supports ETH and most standard ERC-20 tokens, but it does not support fee-on-transfer or rebasing tokens according to Optimism documentation.

faq.q: Do I need ETH to bridge optimism?
faq.a: Yes, expect to need ETH for gas on the sending network, and review wallet prompts carefully before approving or signing any transaction.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify app.optimism.io before connecting, and use this page for education only, not financial advice.
